interpretation.positive_result: wide safeguarded PBB improves validation mean and family/joint OOD at the same A/A^T budget
interpretation.failure_result: the same rule has a large validation harm tail and severe noise-OOD regression
interpretation.mechanism_diagnosis: data-fidelity descent can continue after truth-field error begins to rise; objective descent alone is not a noise stopping rule
interpretation.strict_result: the classical sub-2/L cap clips nearly every spectral proposal and collapses toward fixed Landweber

next_decision.next_control: noise-aware discrepancy or residual-whiteness stopping on the same PBB trajectory
next_decision.second_control: literature-aligned nonmonotone SPG with all line-search A calls charged
next_decision.reason: mean acceleration is real, but the current rule is not tail-safe or noise-OOD safe

novelty_boundary.potential_algorithmic_contribution: operator-conditioned noise-aware stopping or safeguarded spectral policy, only after deterministic controls and fresh-lock confirmation
